msg.statusTooltip: lingobridge: estimated tokens (selection if any, else whole document)
ui.placeholderEnter: Enter text to translate (Enter = translate, Shift+Enter = newline)
provider.atrans.notFound: atrans CLI not found. Set `lingobridge.atrans.path` to an absolute path, or install via Homebrew (taogya/atrans).
provider.libre.noLanguages: LibreTranslate is responding but no language models are loaded. Start it with `--load-only ja,en`.
provider.libre.cannotConnect: Cannot reach LibreTranslate. Run `pip install libretranslate` and `libretranslate --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5000 --load-only ja,en`.
provider.libre.cannotConnectShort: Cannot reach LibreTranslate server. Start `libretranslate --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5000 --load-only ja,en`.
provider.transformers.notInstalled: transformers.js backend not installed. Run the `lingobridge: Install transformers.js Backend` command.
provider.transformers.noModel: No transformers model is mapped for `{0}`. Configure `lingobridge.transformers.modelMap`.
provider.transformers.installPrompt: Install the transformers.js backend (~260MB)? It runs entirely in-process — no server is required after install. Press Confirm to run `npm install @huggingface/transformers` in the extension directory.
provider.transformers.installStarted: lingobridge: installing @huggingface/transformers in a terminal. Reload the window after the install completes.
